name: DiffPalReview
description: Run DiffPal review for Azure DevOps pull requests.
helpMarkDown: Installs DiffPal by default, then runs `diffpal review ado`.
author: DiffPal

inputs.name: install
inputs.label: Install DiffPal
inputs.helpMarkDown: Install @diffpal/diffpal before running the review. Disable this when diffpal is already installed on PATH.

inputs.name: diffpalVersion
inputs.label: DiffPal version
inputs.helpMarkDown: npm version or dist-tag for @diffpal/diffpal.

inputs.name: diffpalPath
inputs.label: DiffPal path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path or command name for the diffpal binary. Custom paths skip automatic installation.

inputs.name: base
inputs.label: Base revision
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base revision. Defaults to System.PullRequest.TargetCommitId when empty.

inputs.name: head
inputs.label: Head revision
inputs.helpMarkDown: Head revision. Defaults to System.PullRequest.SourceCommitId, then Build.SourceVersion, when empty.

inputs.name: configDir
inputs.label: Config directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Extra config root directory.

inputs.name: profile
inputs.label: Profile
inputs.helpMarkDown: Config profile name.

inputs.name: blockOn
inputs.label: Block on severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Severity threshold that marks findings as blocking.

inputs.name: gate
inputs.label: Gate pull request
inputs.helpMarkDown: Return non-zero when blocking findings exist.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: Publish modes
inputs.helpMarkDown: Advanced comma-separated Azure DevOps publish modes. Overrides feedback when set.

inputs.name: feedback
inputs.label: Feedback
inputs.helpMarkDown: Review feedback shape. Summary posts status and one PR summary. Balanced adds actionable inline threads. Inline uses a more permissive inline threshold.

inputs.name: language
inputs.label: Language
inputs.helpMarkDown: Language for generated review findings.

inputs.name: reviewChecks
inputs.label: Review checks
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated checks to run: security, bugs, performance, best-practices.

inputs.name: instructions
inputs.label: Review instructions
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional review instructions for local prompt tuning.

inputs.name: instructionsFile
inputs.label: Review instructions file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to additional review instructions.

inputs.name: out
inputs.label: Output bundle
inputs.helpMarkDown: Output findings bundle path.

inputs.name: repo
inputs.label: Repository id
inputs.helpMarkDown: Repository id for deterministic fingerprints.

inputs.name: reviewId
inputs.label: Review id
inputs.helpMarkDown: Review identifier for deterministic outputs.

inputs.name: maxFiles
inputs.label: Max files
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum files from diff.

inputs.name: contextLines
inputs.label: Context lines
inputs.helpMarkDown: Context lines to enrich each changed file.

inputs.name: maxPatchChars
inputs.label: Max patch chars
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum context characters per chunk.

inputs.name: maxFilesPerChunk
inputs.label: Max files per chunk
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum files per context chunk.
